name: play_tone
description: Play a DTMF or beep tone. Specify the tone type and duration in milliseconds.

tone.description: Tone type: DTMF_0-9, DTMF_S(star), DTMF_P(pound), SUP_DIAL, ANSI_DIAL, JAPAN_DIAL, SUP_BUSY, ANSI_BUSY, SUP_CONGESTION, ANSI_CONGESTION, SUP_RADIO_ACK, SUP_RADIO_NA, SUP_ERROR, SUP_CALL_WAITING, SUP_RINGTONE, PROP_BEEP, PROP_ACK, PROP_NACK, PROP_PROMPT, PROP_BEEP2
